prompts.prompt:
Vertical 9:16 illustration, modern semi-realistic digital art. A teenager or young adult in casual clothes (hoodie, jeans, backpack on one shoulder) stands in a slightly gloomy classroom in front of a huge blackboard filled with complex formulas, dates, and abstract academic notes. The person looks confused, holding an open but empty toolbox in their hands; on the toolbox there is a clear label in Russian: «LIFE SKILLS». Bright daylight comes from a side window, creating a strong contrast between the overloaded theory on the blackboard and the emptiness of the toolbox, symbolizing missing life skills. 

Include large, bold Russian text as part of the scene, integrated into the composition, easy to read on a mobile screen:
Main title text (very large): «Школа не учит» 
Body text (medium-large, but still very readable): «Ты тоже закончил школу… и все равно не понимаешь, как жить во «взрослом мире»? Дело не в тебе — тебе просто не дали ключевые навыки.»

Text placement and style: place the title «Школа не учит» in the upper third of the image, centered, as if it is written with clean, bold, modern sans-serif lettering over a slightly darkened area of the blackboard; make it bright white for strong contrast. Place the body text in the lower third, left-aligned in a semi-transparent dark rectangle overlay that slightly covers the classroom desks, ensuring high readability. Use a contemporary, clean sans-serif font, with generous line spacing and large size. 

Color palette: muted cool tones for the classroom (dark green/black board, greyish walls, wooden desks), with a beam of warm daylight from the window. Mood: thoughtful, slightly frustrated but not hopeless, professional and attention-grabbing. Ensure there is enough empty space around the text so it feels balanced and uncluttered.

Vertical 9:16 split-screen composition, modern digital illustration. On the left side: a close-up of a neat math notebook on a school desk, with formulas for area, geometric figures, rulers and a pencil; everything looks tidy and theoretical. On the right side: the same young person from slide 1, now in simple work clothes (T-shirt, joggers, maybe knee pads), measuring a real wall in a room with a tape measure. Around them are paint cans, a roller, parquet varnish, and a calculator in their hand; they look thoughtful, planning a budget and materials. The contrast shows theory vs real-life practice. 

Include large, bold Russian text integrated into the image:
Title (large): «Навык №1: практика»
Body text (medium-large): «В школе: задачи про площадь. В жизни: надо недорого отремонтировать комнату. Умеешь превратить теорию в реальные действия?»

Text placement and style: place the title «Навык №1: практика» in the top center, overlapping both sides of the split-screen, in a bright, bold sans-serif font with a subtle shadow for readability. Place the body text in the lower third, slightly shifted to the right side over the room scene, inside a semi-transparent dark rounded rectangle so it stands out from the background. Keep the font clean, modern, and large enough for mobile reading. 

Color palette: left side in cooler, desaturated school tones (whites, light blues, greys); right side warmer and more vivid (beige walls, warm wooden floor, colorful paint cans). Mood: energetic, practical, motivating, showing transition from abstract to hands-on action.

Vertical 9:16 conceptual illustration, modern flat-meets-3D style. On the left half of the image: a stylized human brain drawn as a bookshelf. Inside the brain-shelf, separate closed boxes or compartments neatly labeled in English but small (for atmosphere): 'Math', 'History', 'Biology', 'Geography'; each box is isolated, with no connections. On the right half: another brain, more dynamic, where colorful lines and threads connect small icons from different fields: a snowflake, an army helmet, a map, a thermometer, money bills/coins, etc., forming an integrated network. The right brain feels alive and glowing. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Навык №2: связывать знания»
Body text (medium-large): «В школе предметы лежат по разным «полкам». В жизни всё смешано: история, география, биология, деньги — в одной задаче.»

Text placement and style: place the title «Навык №2: связывать знания» at the top, centered between the two brains, in a bold, modern sans-serif font, bright white or light color. Place the body text in the lower third, centered, inside a slightly transparent dark rectangle overlay spanning across both halves, but not covering the main details of the brains. Keep the text large, with good line spacing and margins. 

Color palette: left brain in muted greys and dull beige tones; right brain with vibrant accent colors (turquoise, yellow, magenta, lime) on a dark bluish background, to emphasize connections. Mood: intelligent, inspiring, showing the power of integrated thinking.

Vertical 9:16 digital illustration, semi-realistic with UI elements. A teenager sits at a desk with a laptop in front of them. The laptop screen shows a messy webpage full of clickbait headlines, flashy banners, and red warning icons. Around the teen's head float semi-transparent panels like augmented reality: search results, article snippets, and small windows. Some panels are clearly marked with green checkmarks and the Russian label «надежный источник», others with red crosses and the Russian label «фейк». The teen squints critically, holding a pen and crossing out something in their notebook. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Навык №3: проверять инфу»
Body text (medium-large): «Списать доклад из интернета — легко. Понять, что там чушь или устаревшее — уже навык. Ты умеешь отличать знание от мусора?»

Text placement and style: place the title «Навык №3: проверять инфу» at the top left, over a slightly darkened gradient so it is very readable, in a bold sans-serif font. Place the body text in the lower third, slightly right-aligned, inside a semi-transparent dark rounded rectangle overlay that covers part of the desk but not the teen’s face. Use white text, clean and large, with enough spacing for mobile reading. 

Color palette: cool bluish tones for the digital environment, with contrasting red and green accents for the fake/reliable markers. The room background is soft and slightly blurred. Mood: focused, critical, empowering, showing the skill of filtering information.

Vertical 9:16 illustration, modern comic-style split-scene in one frame. Two teens (any gender mix, casual school clothes) sit on a bench in a schoolyard (background slightly blurred). On the left part of the scene, they are turned away from each other, tense body language; above their heads are grey speech bubbles filled with messy scribbles and chaotic lines. On the right part, like an overlay or second frame, the same teens have turned toward each other, faces calmer, posture relaxed. Above them are clear icons: a heart, an ear, and a handshake, symbolizing empathy, listening, and agreement. The two moments slightly overlap to show “before/after” in one vertical composition. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Навык №5: чувства и люди»
Body text (medium-large): «В школе учат решать уравнения, но не конфликты. Понимать свои эмоции и чужие — это тоже навык, а не «врождённый талант».»

Text placement and style: place the title «Навык №5: чувства и люди» at the top center, over a subtle dark gradient to ensure legibility, in a bold, friendly sans-serif font. Place the body text in the lower third, centered, in a semi-transparent dark rounded rectangle that slightly covers the bench area but leaves the teens’ faces visible. Use white text, large and airy. 

Color palette: soft, warm tones (soft greens of the yard, warm light), with greyish tones on the tense left side and warmer, slightly brighter colors on the calm right side. Mood: empathetic, hopeful, about emotional intelligence and communication.

Vertical 9:16 digital illustration with a large semi-transparent map of Europe floating in the air. A young person stands in the foreground, tracing a route from Moscow to Berlin with their finger on the glowing map. Around the route, floating labels appear like modern UI cards, showing distances and travel times in Russian: one label with kilometers, one with hours/days by car, one by plane, one by foot. In the background, on the ground or a side table, old-school globes and long wooden rulers lie unused and slightly out of focus, symbolizing outdated, isolated knowledge. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Навык №4: ориентироваться»
Body text (medium-large): ««От Москвы до Берлина» — это сколько в часах, днях, километрах? Умение видеть картину целиком экономит время, деньги и нервы.»

Text placement and style: place the title «Навык №4: ориентироваться» at the top center, over the darker part of the map, in a bright, bold sans-serif font. Place the body text in the lower third, left-aligned, inside a semi-transparent dark rectangle overlay that partially covers the lower part of the map but leaves the person’s hand and route visible. Use white text, modern and large, easy to read on a phone. 

Color palette: cool blues and teals for the map, with glowing route in bright yellow or neon cyan. Background elements in muted neutrals. Mood: exploratory, smart, about seeing the big picture and making informed decisions.

Vertical 9:16 before/after composition, divided horizontally. The top half: a chaotic scene of a desk and room. Papers scattered, open textbooks, multiple digital notifications popping up around a stressed young person (same character as previous slides) who holds their head, looking overwhelmed. Phone screen shows many unread messages and alerts. The bottom half: the same person, calmer and more focused, at a tidy desk. In front of them is a simple handwritten weekly planner with clearly marked blocks in Russian for «учёба», «ЕГЭ», «друзья», «хобби», «отдых». Phone is on the desk with almost no notifications. The transition between top and bottom is smooth, like chaos dissolving into order. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Навык №6: планировать»
Body text (medium-large): «Учёба, ЕГЭ, друзья, хобби… Без планирования это вечный стресс и чувство вины. С планом — ты управляешь своим днём, а не наоборот.»

Text placement and style: place the title «Навык №6: планировать» centered at the very top, overlaying the chaotic upper scene but with a dark gradient behind it for contrast. Place the body text across the middle-lower area, slightly overlapping the border between chaos and order, inside a semi-transparent dark rounded rectangle, centered. Use a clean, bold sans-serif font, white color, with large size and comfortable line spacing. 

Color palette: top half in harsher, slightly saturated reds and oranges with cluttered feeling; bottom half in calmer, soft blues and greens with warm neutral light. Mood: from stress to control, showing relief through planning.

Vertical 9:16 conceptual illustration. At the top and middle of the image, a cutaway view of a classic school building facade: inside different classrooms, teachers in formal clothes pour bright, colored liquids labeled with subject names (in Russian or small English for atmosphere) like «Математика», «История», «Химия» into separate glass jars on shelves. Each jar stays isolated, with no mixing. At the bottom of the image, outside on the street in the “real world”, a young person stands at a table, taking those different colored liquids from the jars and pouring them into one big transparent container labeled in Russian: «LIFE». The mixture in the big container glows intensely and casts colorful light on the street and the person’s face. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «В чём подвох школы»
Body text (medium-large): «Школа даёт предметы, но почти не даёт метанавыки: как соединять знания, общаться, планировать и проверять информацию. А именно на этом строится взрослая жизнь.»

Text placement and style: place the title «В чём подвох школы» in the upper third, over a slightly darkened sky/background area above the school building, centered, in a bold sans-serif font, bright white. Place the body text in the lower third, centered above or next to the glowing «LIFE» container, inside a semi-transparent dark rectangle overlay that does not hide the main action. Use white text, large and legible, with good spacing. 

Color palette: school interior in more muted, institutional colors (beige, grey, dull blue), while the subject liquids and the big «LIFE» container are vivid neon colors (cyan, magenta, yellow, lime). Mood: revealing, slightly critical but constructive, emphasizing transformation of school subjects into real life.

Vertical 9:16 warm digital illustration. A young person sits at a desk in a cozy corner, illuminated by a warm desk lamp. On the desk is a large sheet of paper titled in Russian «Мой план навыков» or left untitled but clearly divided into boxes. In or above the boxes, clear Russian headings: «Практика», «Критическое мышление», «Коммуникация», «Планирование». Around the sheet are small icons: a DIY project symbol (hammer and paintbrush), a magnifying glass over text, two people talking, a simple calendar. The person is drawing or writing in the boxes, looking focused but hopeful. The background is soft and slightly blurred, suggesting evening and a peaceful atmosphere. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Что с этим делать»
Body text (medium-large): «Хорошая новость: все эти навыки можно добрать самому. Маленькие проекты, критическое мышление, честные разговоры и простой ежедневный план — уже начало.»

Text placement and style: place the title «Что с этим делать» at the top center, over a slightly darkened gradient above the scene, in a bold, modern sans-serif font. Place the body text in the lower third, left-aligned, inside a semi-transparent dark rounded rectangle overlay that covers the lower edge of the desk but not the person’s hands. Use white text, large and easy to read on mobile. 

Color palette: warm yellows and oranges from the lamp, contrasted with deep blues or dark neutrals in the background. Mood: encouraging, calm, giving a sense of agency and realistic hope.

Vertical 9:16 close-up digital illustration, minimalistic and modern. In the center, a hand holds a smartphone vertically. On the phone screen is a simple checklist in Russian with six items, each representing one skill. The list items, in clear large text, for example: «Практика», «Связывать знания», «Проверять инфу», «Ориентироваться», «Чувства и люди», «Планировать». One of the items is highlighted with a bright accent color and a checkmark circle next to it. Next to the phone on the table is a pen, drawing a tick next to a small handwritten note in Russian: «первый шаг сделан». In the background, soft minimal icons of progress bars and arrows gently moving upward, very subtle and abstract. 

Include large Russian text:
Title (large): «Твой следующий шаг»
Body text (medium-large): «Выбери один навык, которого тебе сильнее всего не хватает. И сегодня сделай крошечный шаг, чтобы его прокачать.»

Text placement and style: place the title «Твой следующий шаг» at the top center, in a bold, clean sans-serif font, over a slightly darkened gradient. Place the body text in the lower third, centered, inside a semi-transparent dark rounded rectangle overlay that does not cover the phone screen area. Use white text, large and simple, with comfortable line spacing for mobile readability. 

Color palette: light neutral background (soft beige or light grey), with accent colors (teal, purple, or bright blue) on the highlighted checklist item and subtle progress icons. Mood: focused, motivating, actionable, with a sense of clarity and simplicity.
